nodes.goal: Load OSM building footprints for the Chicago Loop.
Add a computed footprint-area property to every building feature.
Buildings colored by height, with picking enabled.
Scatter of building footprint area vs height, brushable and linked to the map.

dataflow.name: Autark Interaction
dataflow.task: Minimal Autark teaching example: load OSM buildings, annotate footprint area in a Compute node, render the buildings on a map colored by height, scatter area vs height in a brushable plot, and link map ↔ plot.
